positive: A minimalist, stylized representation of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features geometrically simple, ethereal trees with luminous, glowing foliage and roots that mimic glowing nebula clouds. The main subject is a majestic, stylized moon phase, depicted as a perfect crescent, floating among the crystalline branches. The overall composition is highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing clean, distinct silhouettes against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Use a limited color palette of deep blues, royal purple, luminescent cyan, and touches of metallic gold for highlights. The style should be a blend of contemporary vector art, graphic novel aesthetics, and elegant stained-glass window detailing. The art must be perfectly crisp, high contrast, and designed to repeat seamlessly on fabric.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, lowres, artifacts, text, watermarks, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, copyright, bokeh
